description: Cross-adapter local A2A pairing invite wire shape. The decoded JSON object that a `napaxi-a2a-invite:` QR/text payload base64url-encodes. Field names, the QR prefix, and the schema version are pinned in Rust core at napaxi_core::api::a2a::local_pairing_contract and must match on every adapter (Flutter/Android/iOS). See docs/sdk-adapter-parity.md.
